westernWall.resign: You retreat to the western wall and descend from the storm-wracked skyline.

ancientDome.resign: You clamber down from the ancient dome, descending from the storm-wracked skyline.

hangingShip.slide: Slide Hanging Ship into an adjacent open sky

magneticSpires.swap: Choose an open sky up to 2 spaces away and swap Magnetic Spires with it

easyStandard.skull: -X. X is the current Storm Intensity.
easyStandard.cultist: -4. If this test fails, place 1 doom on the nearest enemy.
easyStandard.tablet: -1 for each open sky adjacent to your current location.
easyStandard.elderThing: -2. If there is an enemy at your location, reveal another token.

hardExpert.skull: -X. X is 2 more than the current Storm Intensity.
hardExpert.cultist: -6. Place 1 doom on the nearest enemy.
hardExpert.tablet: -2 for each open sky adjacent to your current location.
hardExpert.elderThing: -4. If there is an enemy at your location, reveal another token.

resolution1.title: Resolution 1
resolution1.body: _Resolution 1_: Andy sits on a glistening boulder, doing his best not to look shaken. "Well. I thought this trip was going to make my career. But as it turns out—between alien parasites, magnetic storms, and, you know, the Pacific Ocean—my career didn't stand a chance," he sighs. "At least we're back in one piece. Well, mostly," he laughs, favoring his bandaged arm.

resolution2.title: Resolution 2
resolution2.body: _Resolution 2_: You join Ruby at the crest of the ancient court. As you peer down into the depths, you are stunned by the sheer breadth of the structure. Below, a towering lift stands in the center of a cathedral-like nave, surrounded by spiraling ringed floors. Five long apses radiate outward from the central structure like obsidian claws, dominating the otherworldly skyline.

noResolution.title: No Resolution
noResolution.body: _If no resolution was reached_: The storms scatter the expedition across the obsidian skyline. Battered and disoriented, you eventually regroup at the shoreline, having lost the thread of your purpose among the howling winds.
